original: We have breaking news now in Sydney where two officers have escaped serious injury after
translation: A ní ìròyìn tuntun ní Sydney nísinsìnyí níbi tí àwọn ọlọ́pàá méjì ti sá fún àjálù tó burú jáì lẹ́yìn tí

original: a police car crashed and flipped in the city's west.
translation: ọkọ̀ ọlọ́pàá kan ṣubú, ó sì yí pa dà ní apá ìwọ̀ oòrùn ìlú náà.

original: It landed on its roof in Gilford around 5.30 this morning when the constables from Auburn
translation: Ó dé orí òrùlé rẹ̀ ní Gilford ní nǹkan bí aago márùnléláàádọ́ta òwúrọ̀ yìí nígbà tí àwọn ọlọ́pàá láti Auburn

original: were responding to reports of men acting suspiciously in a car.
translation: wọ́n ń fèsì sí ìròyìn nípa àwọn ọkùnrin tó ń hùwà lọ́nà tí kò bójú mu nínú ọkọ̀.

original: Both officers are now being checked out at hospital.
translation: Wọ́n ń ṣàyẹ̀wò àwọn ọlọ́pàá méjèèjì ní ilé ìwòsàn báyìí.
